mapper.select:
SELECT du.id, du.production_line_id, du.unit_code, du.unit_name, du.creator_id, du.created_at AS createAt, du.updated_at AS updateAt FROM device_unit du WHERE du.production_line_id = #{productionLineId}
AND du.creator_id = #{creatorId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO device_unit
production_line_id, unit_code, unit_name, creator_id, created_at, updated_at,
#{productionLineId}, #{unitCode}, #{unitName}, #{creatorId}, #{createAt}, #{updateAt},
mapper.select:
SELECT du.id, du.production_line_id, du.unit_code, du.unit_name, du.creator_id, du.created_at AS createAt, du.updated_at AS updateAt FROM device_unit du WHERE du.id = #{id}
AND du.creator_id = #{creatorId}
SELECT id, production_line_id, unit_code, unit_name, creator_id, created_at AS createAt, updated_at AS updateAt FROM device_unit WHERE unit_code = #{unitCode} AND creator_id = #{creatorId} LIMIT 1
